content.name: Stock Data Fetcher
content.summary: Sub-module for fetching real-time stock market data.
content.description: Fetches current price, P/E ratio, market cap, and 52-week range for a given ticker symbol. Returns structured JSON data to the parent flow (stock_analysis).

params.ticker: Stock ticker symbol passed from parent flow

content.system_prompt: You are a stock data fetching specialist. Your task is to fetch real-time market data for the given ticker symbol and return it in structured format.

start.step1: Receive ticker symbol from parent flow

validate.step1: Check if ticker is a valid stock symbol (alphanumeric, 1-5 characters)
validate.step2: If invalid, return error message to parent

fetch_price.step1: Search for '{ticker} stock price' using google_search or web_browser
fetch_price.step2: Extract current price from search results

fetch_fundamentals.step1: Fetch P/E ratio from financial data sources

format.step1: Structure data as JSON: ticker, price, change, pe_ratio, market_cap, 52w_high, 52w_low

return.step2: Return formatted JSON to parent flow

error.step2: Suggest parent flow ask user for correct ticker
